memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Count of Perche and Montague.  He fought in the Norman army at the Battle of Hastings, 11 Oct 1066; an associate, if not a companion of William the Conqueror.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/Med …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne於1041年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內時，他的父親Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun20歲，母親Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne16歲。他於大約1066年與Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy在法國皮卡迪結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1100年10月在法國巴-諾門迪奧內多福洛特享年59歲，埋葬在法國。

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne was born in 1041, in Orne, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, was 20 and his mother, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, was 16. He married Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy about 1066, in Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in October 1100, in Domfront, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne est né en 1041, à Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy environ 1066, à Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1100, à Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne 1041 in Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun 20 und seine Mutter Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne 16. Er hat um 1066 in Picardie, Frankreich Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1100 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne è nato il nel 1041 nel Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy circa 1066, nel Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1100, nel Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagneが1041年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンで生まれた時，父Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudunは20歳，母Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagneは16歳であった。約1066年にフランスピカーディでBéatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1100年10月にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンドムフロントで59歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne(이)가 1041년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1066년 프랑스 피카디에서 Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1100년 10월 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 돔프론트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne nasceu em 1041, em Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy aproximadamente 1066, em Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1100, em Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne родился в 1041 г. в местности орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy около 1066 г. в местности пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер октябрь 1100 г. в местности домфронт, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne nació en 1041, en Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy aproximadamente 1066, en Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1100, en Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Francia.
